summary.intent: Build a comprehensive Electron/React UI for 'gossamer' (a Claude Code session monitor) using Mantine as the component library, with features including dark mode, chat-style session transcript view, breadcrumb navigation, open item management with status tracking, and the ability to spawn new Claude sessions from selected open items.
summary.outcome: Successfully migrated all UI components to Mantine, implemented full dark/light mode support, redesigned the session view as a chat transcript with grouped tool uses, added breadcrumb navigation, built an open items panel with status management (open/in_progress/complete/n_a) that persists across checkpoint re-indexing, and implemented a session spawn flow that opens a new Terminal window via AppleScript.

repo: Gossamer uses a hook-based architecture: ~/.claude/settings.json hooks → claude-hook-handler binary → SQLite DB (~/.claude/hook-handler.db) → HTTP server on port 3000
The indexer (src/indexer.ts) re-processes checkpoint data on every run, originally wiping OpenItem rows via deleteMany/createMany — must use upsert to preserve user-set fields
SDK query() bypasses the claude CLI entirely (calls API directly), so gossamer hooks never fire unless settingSources: ['user', 'project'] is passed — this loads ~/.claude/settings.json hooks
The CLAUDECODE env var blocks nested Claude Code sessions; delete process.env.CLAUDECODE at server startup allows SDK-spawned sessions
Checkpoint openItems were stored as plain strings originally; migrated to objects with id/text/status/subSessionId fields requiring schema migration
CheckpointSessionMetadata.createdAt (not CheckpointMetadata) holds the timestamp for the latest checkpoint associated with a session
Sessions are ordered by updatedAt DESC in the server query — frontend preserves this order without re-sorting
Prisma schema uses @@unique([checkpointSessionSummaryId, text]) on OpenItem to enable upsert-based indexing

code.finding: groupClaudeTurns() merges consecutive toolGroup DisplayItems + following Stop event into claudeTurn RenderItems for the chat transcript layout
Shared TimeAgo component with relativeTime()/absoluteTime() exports — shows relative time, tooltip with absolute on hover, click-to-copy
React context pattern for sharing breadcrumb state from child pages up to Layout header without prop drilling
AppShell.Header must span full viewport width (above navbar) to keep hamburger visible when sidebar is collapsed — placing it inside AppShell.Main causes it to hide
All color values must use light-dark(lightVal, darkVal) CSS function — Mantine's X-0 color variants are always lightest shade regardless of color scheme
Status inheritance logic: when upserting OpenItems, look up prior status from same session by matching text to preserve user-set statuses across checkpoint re-indexing

POST /api/sessions/spawn uses osascript to open Terminal window running claude with the prompt — platform-specific but preserves interactive capability; spawn endpoint also accepts openItemIds to atomically mark them in_progress

workflow: light-dark() CSS function is the correct pattern for Mantine dark mode — var(--mantine-color-X-0) variants are always light and do not adapt
Mantine AppShell.Header renders above both navbar and main content — use it for elements that must always be visible regardless of sidebar state
Claude Agent SDK query() calls the API directly and does not invoke the claude CLI or fire system hooks — use settingSources: ['user', 'project'] to load hook configuration
localStorageColorSchemeManager persists color scheme preference across Electron app sessions
Prisma db push --accept-data-loss needed when adding unique constraints to tables with existing data
iconutil -c iconset <file.icns> -o <dir> extracts individual PNG sizes from macOS .icns files

friction: CLAUDECODE env var silently blocked SDK-spawned sessions — took significant debugging (DB checks, log inspection, manual node tests) to identify
SDK query() not firing gossamer hooks — required discovering settingSources: ['user', 'project'] option which was not obvious from the SDK docs
OpenItem status being overwritten on every indexer run because indexer used deleteMany+createMany — required schema migration to add unique constraint and switch to upsert
Status showing as 'open' in UI even when DB had correct values — caused by new checkpoint creating fresh OpenItem rows, not matching older rows with updated statuses
updateOpenItemStatus import removed when consolidating spawn flow but still needed for manual status changes — caused ReferenceError at runtime
Objects not valid as React child error when openItems type changed from string[] to object[] — affected both SessionDetail and CheckpointDetail which rendered items directly as children
AppShell hamburger button hidden when sidebar closed — because button was in AppShell.Main which shifts right when navbar collapses
Dark mode sidebar background stuck black — hardcoded var(--mantine-color-dark-7) never adapts; required light-dark() CSS function throughout
open_items: subSessionId is stored in DB schema but never populated — spawn flow opens a Terminal which runs claude independently, so the new session ID is unknown at spawn time; needs a mechanism to link spawned sessions back to their open items
Open item status inheritance only works for exact text matches across checkpoints — if AI rephrases an item, the status resets to 'open'
Spawn via osascript is macOS-specific despite user wanting platform-agnostic solution — needs alternative for Linux/Windows
CheckpointDetail.tsx also renders openItems and may have similar issues with the object format migration
No real-time updates when spawned session completes — user must manually refresh to see status changes in Active Sessions
